initiatives.name: Tacos Not Bombs
initiatives.description: Taco's not Bombs CC is a local non profit organization that is anti war and anti poverty. Our objective is to feed anyone who is hungry.

initiatives.name: Corpus Christi DSA
initiatives.description: The Corpus Christi DSA is our local chapter of the Democratic Socialists of America.

initiatives.name: Free Store Corpus Christi
initiatives.description: We are a group of community members in C.C. Texas, who created a non-profit that provides resources for people experiencing extreme poverty.

initiatives.name: Protect Corpus Christi Bay
initiatives.description: Currently a petition for better science on desalination in the Corpus Christi Bay.
